page: Microsoft Azure M128bds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized server belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, delivering 128 vCPUs across 64 physical cores with a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The processor features a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions for accelerated matrix operations. The system is equipped with 2794.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 21.83 GB per core, and includes 6144 GB of local storage.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance across memory bandwidth and database operations. The server achieved top 10% placement in memory bandwidth tests, reaching 432.24 GB/sec for uncached read-only operations and 187.69 GB/sec for uncached write operations. Database performance is highly competitive, with Redis SET operations reaching 139.35 million operations per second and Passmark database operations scoring in the top tier. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and static web serving throughput also rank in the top 10%, while multi-core CPU performance and LLM inference processing for medium and large models fall within the top 25%.

From a resource density perspective, the M128bds_3_v3 offers high qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring massive memory footprints combined with high-speed local storage, reducing the need for multi-node clustering. However, single-core CPU performance and certain memory latency metrics perform closer to the median, suggesting that workloads relying heavily on single-threaded execution may not fully leverage the hardware's premium profile. This server is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise relational databases, heavy data decompression pipelines, software compilation, and memory-intensive CPU-based machine learning inference.
description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized server in the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, featuring 128 vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. It is configured with 2794.0 GB of RAM and 6144 GB of local storage, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server demonstrates top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, database operations, and multi-threaded decompression, with Redis SET operations achieving 139.35 million operations per second. While single-core performance sits closer to average, its massive memory capacity and high-speed multi-core execution make it highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads. It is best suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise data processing, and heavy software compilation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 2794 GB of RAM, and 6144 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M128bds_3_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 2.8 TB of RAM, and 6.1 TB of local storage.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring massive RAM capacity and local storage for demanding database and data-processing workloads.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8473C processors at 4.0 GHz
2794.0 GB of system memory and 6144 GB of local storage
Top-tier memory bandwidth and database operation benchmarks
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction support for accelerated matrix math
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and heavy data processing
